purpose: Diagnostic cross-LLM verify on Phase 6 top candidate to confirm it would have been rejected even if it had reached threshold 0.90. Formal gate not triggered because 0/84 Phase 6 candidates exceed 0.90.

diagnostic_verify.verdict: HARD_COLLISION on query 3 -> arXiv:2511.06232 already formalizes context-length phase transitions in scaling-law framework. Also EXISTING_PUBLISHED on arXiv:2512.24695 (Nested Learning) which IS the original unification of architecture+training. Joint claim is a surface combine of two published works. REJECT.

remaining_top_4_phase_6_candidates.verify_status: NOT_VERIFIED (formal gate not triggered; below threshold 0.90 by 0.16)
remaining_top_4_phase_6_candidates.preliminary_assessment: Uses PG_E1_A06 which is in the same essay as quarantined PG_E1_A05 'Superlinear Returns'; joint topic 'superlinear world features evidenced by PFN universal in-context engine' has same problems as Run 11 candidates 3 and 5 (Hofstadter 1995 / Shai Shalev-Shwartz collisions).
Tensor network compression + PFN universal engine — both well-covered in MERA/quantum-inspired ML and Bayesian PFN literature.
10M context RLM + RLVR compute shift — both atoms from Run 11 epoch 7 atom pool; combine of two existing claims.
Belief state compressed history + hallucination reduction — WS_E7_A06 directly restates arXiv:2405.15943 (already flagged in Phase 3); collision certain.

summary.n_quarantine_hit_in_phase_6: 0 (all Phase 6 candidates constructed from non-quarantined atoms by design)
summary.implication: Even if threshold 0.90 had been narrowly missed and a Phase 6 candidate had been promoted by some weight perturbation, cross-LLM verify would have caught it. Strict gates are operationally sound. Final Run 12 survivor count: 0.
